## Description
Adding a new financial skill.

## Checklist
- [ ] Directory name is lowercase, hyphens only.
- [ ] `name` in YAML frontmatter matches directory name exactly.
- [ ] `description` is 1-1024 characters with trigger phrases.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` is under 500 lines.
- [ ] `evals/evals.json` is included and passes validation.
- [ ] Skill added to `marketplace.json`.
- [ ] Skill added to `README.md`.
